name: feature-video

scripts.render: remotion render src/index.ts FeatureVideo out/feature.mp4 --codec=h264 && remotion render src/index.ts FeatureVideo out/feature.webm --codec=vp9
scripts.ship: npm run render && bash -c 'mkdir -p "${SHIP_DEST:?Set SHIP_DEST to the destination folder}" && cp out/feature.mp4 "${SHIP_DEST}/feature.mp4" && cp out/feature.webm "${SHIP_DEST}/feature.webm" && echo "Shipped to ${SHIP_DEST}"'

//: Remotion versions: pull `latest` at scaffold time. Run `npm view remotion version` and pin to that exact version. Do not invent versions like 4.0.190 — they may not exist.
